DISCOVERY 525, AUG-15-2024 RE: MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT KYTE SYSTEMS INC.'S FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF?S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE). NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. BASED UPON THE DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY THAT THE DISCOVERY REQUESTS HAVE BEEN FULLY RESPONDED TO, THE MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS MOOT. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO TOM@THOMASCOHEN.COM. Motion To Compel Defendant Kyte Systems Inc.'S Further Responses To Plaintiff?S Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One)
Off Calendar Aug-15-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: 1-PLAINTIFF STEPHAN RICHARDSON Motion To Compel Defendant Kyte Systems Inc.'S Further Responses To Plaintiff's Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One)

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Based upon the declaration of Defendant's attorney that the discovery requests have been fully responded to, the Motion is denied without prejudice as moot.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem to tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (525/JPT)

MINI MINUTES: 2-PLAINTIFF STEPHAN RICHARDSON'S Motion To Compel Defendant Kyte Systems Inc.'S Further Responses To Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories (Set One).

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Based upon the declaration of Defendant's attorney that the discovery requests have been fully responded to, the Motion is denied without prejudice as moot.
